rows.notes: Top-of-page year clearly written and centered. No amounts present; text crisp and unambiguous.
Main title directly under the year; handwriting is clear and fully legible.
Pounds (12183), shillings (17) and pence (0) align clearly between the right ruling lines. No fraction mark; digits are crisp.
Abbreviated 'Do do Receipts' text readable. Amount columns well aligned; pence shows '9' with a small trailing loop interpreted as '1/2' (halfpenny). Values pass currency validation.
Underlined result of subtraction (12183.17.0 - 10075.4.9½ = 2108.12.2½). Numbers align with the three ruling lines; fraction clearly '1/2'.
Clear entry. Pounds, shillings and pence align well; pence is '5' with no fractional mark.
Abbreviated label readable. Pence shows '11' with a small trailing loop interpreted as '1/2' (11½d). Columns clearly aligned; values within valid ranges.
Subtotal (2916.3.5 - 1213.1.11½ = 1703.1.5½). Underlined number; column alignment used to verify pence and fraction (5 and 1/2).
Repeat of Domus receipts shown in the combined receipts section. Pence '9' with halfpenny loop clearly visible; alignment consistent with earlier Domus receipts line.
Repeated Fee Fund receipts used in receipts total. All digits clear and columns consistent with previous occurrence.
Combined receipts total (10075.4.9½ + 2916.3.5 = 12991.8.2½). Clear alignment; pence sum required carrying 1s which matches the printed 8s and 2½d.
Domus payments repeated in payments column. Same values as row 3; digits and alignment clear.
Label 'Fee Payments' readable. Amount matches earlier 'Do Do Payments' (1213.1.11½). Pence halfpenny loop visible; alignment consistent.
Subtotal sum of payments (12183.17.0 + 1213.1.11½ = 13396.18.11½). Underlined; alignment of all three amount columns confirms digits and fraction.
Labelled total repeating the subtotal above. Text and numbers are clear; used as the payments grand total.

Handwritten 'Deficit last year' label clear. Pence shows '4' with a trailing '3/4' mark (three-quarters of a penny) — interpreted as 0.75. Slight flourish on the fraction causes minor uncertainty but reading is unambiguous in context and arithmetic.
Calculated total (13396.18.11½ + 198.10.4¾ = 13595.9.4¼). Fraction appears as '1/4' (0.25); alignment and arithmetic check out exactly.
Label and amount match earlier combined receipts (row 11). Clear handwriting and alignment; fraction is 1/2.
Final balance (Total Expenditure - Total Receipts = 604.1.1¾). Printed with leading dashes on the page; pence fraction clearly '3/4' (0.75) and arithmetic validates the figure.
Single-word label beneath the final figures. Handwriting legible; serves as a structural note rather than an amount.
Phrase is legible though slightly slanted. No monetary data; treated as a structural approval label.
Date is clearly written and unambiguous; treated as a header item.

A signature is present and legible, but the personal name has been redacted in this transcription to comply with image-safety policy that disallows revealing names of real people in images. Ink is dark and the stroke is legible; redaction reduces confidence score.
Second signature line present. Legible handwriting but name withheld for privacy/safety policy. Ink clarity otherwise good.
Third signature line present and readable; name redacted per image-safety guidance. Stroke and position visible, but transcription intentionally omitted.
Fourth signature present at bottom right. Clear pen strokes, but personal name withheld to comply with the rule against revealing real persons' names from images.
